red_baseline.reason: T005 owns failing Kernel gate tests; T006 owns the project resolver, policy pipeline, compatibility gate, unified lock authority, and Kernel scaffold.
red_baseline.summary: Final RED rerun: four files fail only because T006-owned application-kernel/project-context modules and compatibility/lock exports are missing.

validation.summary: 0 passed and 4 failed at missing T006 modules/exports; the planned RED was rerun after adding the high/destructive cases.
All four test files parse successfully.
Syntax check passed for 57 JavaScript files.

review.evidence: The suite is test-only, encodes all required refusal/scope/lock/revalidation cases, and fails only at T006-owned missing contracts. It introduces no adapter policy, handler, state, or effect path.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Tests require one createApplicationKernel pipeline and one mutation-lock authority shared by mutation paths.
Public mutation tests allow only effective low risk and keep higher risk inspect/refuse-only.
Tests require fresh in-lock revalidation and provide no replay/fallback authorization.
Handlers are reachable only through the tested Kernel pipeline after ownership and policy gates.
Permissive annotations and caller-supplied risk/ownership values cannot authorize execution.
Unknown and external ownership cases require refusal with zero handler calls.
Component/version mismatch stays diagnostic-only and blocks task mutations.
Medium, high, and destructive task risk are read dynamically and refused despite permissive hints.
Five scope-failure states are distinct and Plugin installation cwd is explicitly ignored.
Tests require independent axis/component assessment; equal package/path labels cannot restore writes.
Kernel input tests reject caller risk, ownership, compatibility, and projectRoot in addition to the frozen raw task-field negatives.
The same Kernel test boundary owns risk decisions before and under locks.
Host annotations remain hints and never replace re-read policy inputs.
Trusted adapter root conflicts and unregistered roots are separate refusals; Plugin cwd cannot cross project scope.
